response.justification: While Aisha Okonkwo has extensive fullstack experience, her background is heavily skewed toward senior/independent roles (Staff Software Engineer, Senior roles) with limited entry-level or mid-level contributions. Her expertise in diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes) aligns well with the role, but her current position as a Staff Engineer suggests potential overqualification or lack of recent entry-level experience. Her open-source and entrepreneurial projects demonstrate passion and breadth but may not directly reflect the specific renewable energy/construction tech domain.
strengths: Extensive fullstack development experience (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker)
Strong background in scalable architectures (microservices, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
Proven ability to deliver pragmatic, testable solutions in diverse domains
concerns: Likely overqualified for an entry-level role due to senior-level positions held
Limited recent experience in entry-level or collaborative team environments
Domain experience in renewable energy/construction tech is unclear
